arts.ttl: Daniel Farke teases Leeds United teen yet to make debut as possible solution to new injury crisis
arts.sum: Leeds United may only have one fit senior centre-back this weekend with Pascal Struijk and Max Wöber having their respective issues, possibly paving the way for a James Debayo start. In terms of solutions for replacing Struijk and Wöber, the obvious answer is to drop Ethan Ampadu back into the back four next to Wales teammate Joe Rodon.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke shoots down Mateo Joseph vs Joel Piroe Leeds United contest
arts.sum: When we speak about strikers like Mateo, I am happy with his performances. Good for the confidence and mood and judgement if you score a few goals, but he was impresive in pre-season.

arts.ttl: Vocal Manor Solomon concerns from some Leeds United supporters might already be ringing true
arts.sum: Leeds United signed Manor Solomon on a season-long loan in August despite concerns over his major injury record, and he’s suffered another setback this week. Manor Solomon missed out in the win over Cardiff City last time out due to a back issue, opening the door for Largie Ramazani to make his full debut.
